case_title: THE HAMILTON ASSOCIATION VS. DONALD ROBINSON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE HAMILTON ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR THE HAMILTON ASSOCIATION ASSIGNED TO ALLIED TRUSTEE SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED FEB-19-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MARCH-18-2014 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTATIVE & FINAL TRUSTEE DANIELLE WALLER APPEARS; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT DONALD ROBINSON; NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE HAMILTON ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2014 - JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (DEPT. 506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO ASSIGNEE ALLIED TRUSTEE SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HAMILTON ASSOCIATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HAMILTON ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD
